name: Molten Elliptical Galaxy
description: You have been assigned the Molten Elliptical Galaxy — one of the oldest and most monumental galaxies in existence. A vast, smooth sphere of concentrated molten plasma radiating in fiery orange and bronze, this ancient E0-class elliptical is a relic of the early universe, its thermal energy still blazing billions of years after its stars first ignited.

attributes.value: Massive smooth sphere of concentrated molten plasma
